summary:
SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND INTERCESSION: Brandon shares a powerful vision of spiritual revival springing forth like uncapped wells across the United States and globally. He details seeing this wave of glory start in Minneapolis, Minnesota, and rapidly spread to Tennessee, Mobile, Fort Worth, Oklahoma City, Tulsa, and even Nigeria. He emphasizes that these locations are designated glory zones for a major harvest of souls in the last days, driven by the intense intercessory prayers of the faithful. Despite witnessing satanic camps attempting to block this divine movement, Brandon reassures that demonic forces are ultimately defeated by God's overarching power. He also references a book read by his wife, Diana, which highlights the critical, hidden work of intercessors who birth revival through their profound, spirit-led travails.

MEDIA, TECHNOLOGY, AND CHRISTIAN INFLUENCE: Brandon discusses the urgent need for Christians to become trendsetters rather than followers in modern media and technology. He expresses frustration over the censorship of Christian voices on secular platforms and advocates for the creation of a faith-based alternative to networks like Facebook. He notes that the church must move beyond traditional television to effectively reach Generation X and the emerging AI generation. Furthermore, Brandon recounts a vision where he is instructed to pray for Elon Musk's spiritual visitation and describes seeing Mark Zuckerberg hiding in a bunker due to global instability. He underscores the necessity of immense wealth within the Christian community to properly influence political and technological spheres.

IMPENDING THREATS AND INFRASTRUCTURE ATTACKS: Brandon urgently warns of imminent, orchestrated attacks on critical infrastructure across the United States. He describes detailed visions of militants, specifically mentioning Iranian hackers and individuals resembling ISIS sympathizers, conducting surveillance on oil refineries, natural gas plants, and train lines carrying flammable fuels. He vividly recounts seeing men disguised as fishermen in small boats using PVC pipe launchers to target power plants and water systems along major rivers. Furthermore, he warns of a mole leaking sensitive information, placing American service members in danger. Brandon emphasizes that these adversaries are planning multiple synchronized attacks aimed at crippling the nation, urging intense prayer to uncover and neutralize these plots.

GLOBAL POLITICS AND ELITE MANIPULATION: Brandon shares prophetic insights regarding international leadership and the clandestine operations of global elites. He foresees the rise of an openly gay leader in France, closely associated with Emmanuel Macron, whose tenure will bring severe persecution of First Amendment rights and a dramatic surge in antisemitism, forcing Jewish people to flee back to Israel. He also details a vision of powerful international bankers conspiring with demonic forces to manipulate politicians and push Agenda 2030. Additionally, Brandon touches upon the volatile political landscape surrounding Donald Trump, the unreliability of NATO, and a future focus on Greenland and Cuba, stressing that elite manipulation aims to control the global economy.

FUTURE TRIBULATIONS AND SPECIFIC EVENT WARNINGS: Brandon delivers a sobering glimpse into the approaching seven-year tribulation, describing it as an era of unprecedented darkness, plagues, and societal decay driven by a demonic AI system and an intensified authoritarian regime. He describes seeing the Vatican burning and global hospitals overwhelmed by chaos and disease. On a more immediate scale, he calls for targeted prayers over specific dates and locations, highlighting the 18th and the 20th. He points to major public gatherings such as the Boston Marathon, Coachella, and NBA games involving the Boston Celtics and New York Knicks as areas needing spiritual protection. Brandon concludes by urging believers to continuously intercede to mitigate these impending crises.
rawData: [April 09, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/4fTnqDOIePk]-[Well, good evening, family. I'm sorry I'm a little late. We went to church, and as I was sitting in church, the Lord gave me an open-eyed vision about what we're supposed to be praying for tonight. So, we're just going to jump right into the river. But I felt led to go over some of the things we saw yesterday when we were praying. Now, we had two videos yesterday. Some of you don't know it; the devil interfered with our internet, and so we just kept going and we ended up praying until almost morning, which was amazing. The glory of the Lord came in and hit me with Holy Ghost laughter. And I'm telling you, I've never done that to that level on a live stream. And so it was pretty amazing—the Lord was just bringing refreshing, especially to me and to my son and to my wife, and just blessing us. You know, when you are in a place of always pouring out, it's nice to get refreshed. And when you get a touch from the Holy Spirit, it's refreshing. There's a lot of you that don't know about it. And they say, 'Well, what is that? What were you doing?' That's just yielding. You can't make it happen, just like you can't make groaning happen. You get over in the flesh and you make things go and act weird, or you can laugh and be in the flesh, but I'd rather be in the flesh in church than in the world, right? And so you start out—it's like people say, 'How do you get over there?' You yield. You yield to the presence of God. You yield to the anointing. You yield. 'Holy Spirit, have your way. Have your way. You are the potter; I am the clay. I am yielded to you today.' When a pot is on the potter's wheel and it's molding, the pot doesn't say, 'Well, I don't like the way you're pushing. I don't like the way you're doing. I want to be this way.' No, it's yielded to the potter. Have your way. So, the potter's up there pushing here, and he's putting all the perfections out and doing all the things that he knows to do to make a good pot. And if you are a yielded vessel, the Holy Spirit will make a good pot. Does that make sense? I'm trying to relate it. And so when you're going over into the laughter and you're just yielded, and it starts out with you just laughing and you feel that bubbling up inside of you, the Holy Spirit will do it just like groanings. It's not something that you just fake. People go around acting weird and try to roll around in the aisle and mock and try to imitate something, but when it's authentic and you feel the presence of God, it's like Braden said: 'Dad, the tangible presence of the Lord was in our house last night. I could feel it.' And you always wonder, because I don't want to be the only one having a good time. When you're at a party, you want everybody else to be having a good time, too, right? You're having a big party, you're celebrating, and Jesus is there, and you're the only one acting crazy. I'd say you're the only one in the town getting drunk. You're the town drunk. But whenever the Holy Ghost and fire is on you and everybody else is, it's like Acts chapter 2. It was just the third hour of the day, right? It's just in the middle of the afternoon. 'Are these men drunk?' They're all thinking they're all wasted, but they weren't. This is what this is. This is that spoken by the prophet Joel: the day of Pentecost. And I truly believe that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. And he's still pouring out his spirit on the church just like he did back in Acts chapter 2. I truly believe if you are a yielded vessel, we can walk in it. And just like Pastor Candace, she was teaching tonight about Moses. He was underneath the old covenant. How much more can we walk in the glory and be in the new covenant, the greater glory, and not just be somebody that is every once in a while visiting there, but somebody that lives there, lives in that presence, in that fullness of the glory, that people see it on you in these last days. So, all right. That's what all that was about. Last night was amazing. I loved it. And if you haven't watched that video, I encourage you, if you just want to have a refreshing, to go watch that video. As we were praying, the Lord showed me the revival again. And I saw Minneapolis, Minnesota, and I saw a well of revival springing forth out of the dirt. It started—do you know how you see cracks in the desert or in a big lake bed whenever the sun has dried up the water and the massive cracks are all in there? And you go, 'Wow, this riverbed is really dry and you can touch it.' But if you just dig down a little bit, the water is there. You just got to dig down a little bit. Well, the water table is always at a certain level. As I was praying into this, I saw the water coming from the fountains from the deep concerning the glory about what we're about to see. And the Lord said, 'Uncap the wells.' Uncap the wells. I saw the wells coming uncapped—what was, you know, when you cap a well and it was a springing forth of new water, new fountains of water. And all of a sudden, those cracks that were all in Minnesota started to fill up with water, and it was just barely touching the feet, just barely covering the soles of your shoes. And you're getting a little wet. But the Lord said, 'I'm going to take it up from where it's just on the soles of your shoes to ankle-deep, to knee-deep, to waist-deep, to over your head.' And he said, 'You can't mess this up. You're not big enough to mess this up for what I'm about to do—the harvest of the prayers for the intercessory prayer that has gone forth. The seeds of prayer are springing forth.' And the Lord said to us last night, 'Watch this.' And all of a sudden, bam, it was in Minnesota. Bam, it went to Tennessee. I saw around Perry Stone's area where he's at, his ministry, springing forth a well. And the Lord said, 'Fill my cup, Lord.' I started singing that song, and the more I sang that song, the glory of the Lord started filling me. I could feel it. It went from Minnesota to Tennessee, to Mobile, Alabama, to Fort Worth, Texas, to Oklahoma City, to Collinsville, to Tulsa, Oklahoma. Boom, boom, boom. And it went to Nigeria, and it started springing forth wells of revival. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to pour.' And I saw a wave of revival coming out of Minnesota again. I saw a wave of the glory of God coming forth out of it. And the Lord said, 'Pray for Mike Lindell. Pray for these people who are running for office in these areas, for Omar to find a new job somewhere else. Praying for revival. Praying for this major harvest.' And I could see it going, and it was touching down in these cities. And he said, 'These are places of harbingers, like harvesters, like crop circles. I don't know how else to say it. There are glory zones—better glory zones, glory manifested zones, designated chosen places for the revival that God has put his finger on.' And when I told you I saw the hand of the Lord—five of it—all his fingers went out over the earth and shafts of light shot down from his fingers and made pillars of light coming from his fingers. And he said, 'These are the places that I have designated for a major harvest of souls in the last days in Tennessee, in these areas.' And there were shafts of light that shot forth, and there was major revival in America and parts of Australia and Asia and the Middle East, Europe, and Africa. And I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, as these shafts of glory came out of the Lord's hand, he said, "I designated these places. I saw satanic camps trying to camp themselves around and about these areas to try to prevent the glory from coming. But they're no match for our heavenly Father. No matter how big the devil tries to be, even on his best day, he's nothing. He's a loser. He's been defeated. And that's what I was trying to tell you all. Do you believe that God can make mistakes? Do you believe that you're a mistake? That God made a mistake by letting you be here for such a time as this? And that was my point in coming across last night when the Lord told me to ask them that. I don't believe that our heavenly Father can ever make a mistake. We are fearfully and wonderfully made, every single one of us. And we have been called to the kingdom for such a time as this. And it's time for you, behind this camera right now, to get a backbone like a crowbar and expect the unexpected—to be expecting God to do something huge through you. It just takes one spark to light a whole forest fire. And he said, 'Pray for the revival.' And then he said, 'Pray for Elon Musk.' There's enough here even right now that we can pray that Elon Musk would have a visitation. I saw to pray for Elon Musk again. He said, 'I'm calling him in. I'm calling him.' Well, 'He's too dark. I don't know. He'll never.' No. The Lord said as I was being persecuted on Facebook, they told me they'd call me, and then they told me they'd call me again, and they keep giving me the runaround. And that's when I said, 'Lord, why is it the body of Christ doesn't have a faith book? Why is it that the body of Christ is always having to use what's the trend? Why are we not the trendsetters? Why is Facebook the leader? Why is Instagram the leader? Why is TikTok the leader? Why is the body of Christ not the head?' And he talked about the money, because the body of Christ chokes on money. You go, 'Well, we can't have that. You know, the love of money is the root of all evil.' But that's why I said you're ignorant: because the Lord wants you to have the exceedingly abundantly above all that you ask or think to be able to have platforms to bring forth the glory. Then whenever we're able to say what we want to say and talk about Jesus where they don't say, 'You know what? We're censoring you.' They turn me off like they did. 'We don't like that you're talking about Jesus. Don't come back,' and they won't give you an excuse other than, 'We don't want you on our platform anymore.' Even with 70,000 subscribers and followers, 'We don't care. There's the button.' Do you understand? And then the Lord showed me, 'Why is it the body of Christ can't have a Facebook? Why can't we believe for that?' Mark Zuckerberg had an idea, but why not us? But it takes us to have a bigger mentality than always thinking of the one-eyed monster with the TV. And now the church is chasing TV. And I hate to say it, but TV's out. It's not the cool thing anymore. I mean, who watches Christian television very much? Not us. I don't know very many of the younger generation that does. Maybe a handful of them, but a lot of boomers maybe, but a lot of the younger generation—Braden, he goes, 'TV? What?' They don't even know about TV. His generation doesn't even care about TV. So, you're going to lose a generation for the cause. Do you understand? No offense to Daystar and TBN or whoever, God TV or whatever it is, or Victory Network, but I'm going to tell you, you're going to lose a whole generation. The boomers already either know or they don't know. But where's Generation X or the new AI generation? We've got to start thinking faster and be more effective. And that's what I'm praying: be more effective in these last days. Are you going to miss a generation for Jesus? What is drawing them in? When I was praying for Ericka and her ministry with Charlie Kirk, Turning Point, for the singing and the concerts and praying for things, how do we get the young generation to be engaged in church? I don't want to lose this generation. That's why even with the youth building, we're building this new youth facility because of the visions about the kids and the youth and the things that they're believing for. It takes somebody thinking outside of the box to reach a generation for Christ. And if we always think, 'Well, it's what the older people do,' then you're in trouble if you don't start planning now. And that's why I got so frustrated because the body of Christ is always thinking way behind. Well, we're chasing the TV and I'm like, 'No, no, no. You're off. This is off. I know it by the Spirit of God. You're off. This is not right. You've got to get on the right road. We've got to get on the right road.' And now you see, well, Facebook's kind of fading out, but what's the new thing? What's going to be the new thing to reach this new generation? Ai, but what will AI do? And the Lord said, 'If you pray, I will show you the secret things of that which is to come. What will be trending in two years, five years, I will let you be the leader of the trend.' But if you keep chasing the trend, it's just like chasing the news, praying over the news. Well, you know, I saw today that President Trump said the war is over and then Iran said this. 'What did I tell you was coming?' No. What did the Holy Spirit tell you was coming? Not Brandon Biggs. I've got to get it. It's just bad vocabulary. What did the Holy Spirit say? 'Israel. Pay attention to Israel. Israel will strike.' I didn't see America. I said Israel will blow up all their oil wells in the days ahead. Israel will do this. And anti-Semitism will rise up all over the world. Do you remember this? I didn't say America will do it. I said Israel will act alone and anti-Semitism will be at an all-time high against the Jews in the days ahead, and it will be so bad that they won't even be able to go to restaurants or to grocery stores without there being rioting and picketing and throwing rocks at them and things like that. It will be of biblical proportions. I said a new Hitler type of anti-Semitism—remember what I told you—will spring forth in Europe like it was in the Holocaust and it will be so bad that the Jews will flee and come back to Israel. I warned you of this. I saw this. It was a very detailed vision. Well, all these things are happening. Show them that. What is that? Trump's ceasefire. Do you show them? This is what the Holy Spirit said. So, we keep praying. We keep praying. So, as I was praying, I saw the wells of revival springing forth all over this land. And the Lord said, 'This will be a place of refuge to come and get a drink, and I will bring fresh anointing through your platform to bring forth where people don't have it.' You say, 'Well, I live in the middle of the country and we don't have a church like you're talking about and I've got to drive over 100 miles to go to a church like that because there isn't anybody around here like that. We're all dried up.' The Lord said, 'Be an oasis on the internet for people to come and get a drink.' He said it last night and he said, 'I'm going to as of now increase the anointing of the refreshing that will come through this camera so that you can have hope to get through your day.' Not through Brandon Biggs, but I'm telling you by the Holy Ghost. And I said, 'Lord, I'll yield to whatever you have for me.' I'll say whatever you want me to say, but I want you to drink from the well that never shall run dry. Fill our cup, Lord. That's why I sang it last night: 'I lift it up, Lord.' And I could feel the refreshing. I pray you got refreshed. We had over 42 salvations last night off that—30-something. It was amazing, wasn't it? Yes. I don't want to quit because it's so many days in a row. 42—is that right? I try to memorize it because I like to keep track of how many we get in a month. It's amazing how many people come in; Jesus gets them. Okay, so that was part of what we saw last night. If you didn't watch that, I know it was almost four hours worth of videos. It's a long one, but I wasn't even going to do a video tonight until the Lord said, 'Brandon, this is what's coming.' I was sitting in church and I went over into the realm, and I could hardly hear what she was teaching the congregation on regarding the glory because I wasn't really there. I was looking over at what the Lord had me praying for tonight. Let me tell you what he said about tonight. He said, 'Do you see this now? Do you see the thumbnail?' You see the background, right? Did you put the background down? You see my background? That's what we are praying over. I saw attacks on our oil refineries and our oil facilities all over America. I know it was symbolic, but I could see Muslim men who looked like ISIS sympathizers casing our oil facilities and gas plants—natural gas, propane, and so on. I saw railroad tankers that look like propane tanks going down the rail. They were targeting propane tanks on trains—flammable fuels on these tankers on railroads. The Lord showed me those, and as I was in the spirit, I could see them moving down the railroad tracks in an area with a lot of trees. This looked like an area probably in the East because we don't have trees that look like that until you get over into Arkansas. Oklahoma is pretty prairie in some parts with a lot of red dirt. As I was looking into this, I saw railroad cars and the targeting of our electric grid. The Lord said, 'Pray over this tonight. This is a major assignment and you're on high alert for this.' That's what I saw. It was very detailed visions as I was in church; it was very clear, and the Lord said, 'Pray over this. This is very serious.' That's why you see what you see behind me. The other part was praying over the Strait. I told you I have to stretch my legs out; I'm going to have to get a little footrest or something because when I sit here, I like to prop my feet up. I put it on my trash can; I made my own little step stool here. I don't like to sit Indian style for so long that my legs go to sleep. As we were praying into it last night and praying over the Strait, I wanted to tell you this: I support President Trump. I pray for him to have wisdom. I know he's doing the best he knows how to do. If you really realize what a mess it all is—they don't come out and tell you the sky is falling like Chicken Little because one little spark of anything... look how volatile the market is. The war is over, everything goes... then it looks like a ceasefire is over, then I think there's going to be a ceasefire again, and the economy fluctuates just by one word out of a man's mouth. I haven't seen anything like it. If you come out as a president and say this or that, all of a sudden you're powerful. You can't say the sky is falling because if the sky is falling, people are selling everything and bunkering down in a hole. I saw Mark Zuckerberg down in there looking at the hole, like, 'Oh God, what's going on?' and I kept seeing Mark Zuckerberg sticking his head out this peephole. I keep seeing it all the time. I was like, 'What is that guy doing?' The other part was, do you remember when I told you I saw a leader over France? I said this man will be homosexual and will be a forerunner to take over France in the days ahead. He will have the same kind of spirit that is over the guy at CNN; he will be very similar in the way he acts, like the gray-haired guy, Anderson Cooper. I said he's similar to Anderson Cooper in the way he carries himself and talks. I said I saw a man running for president who will be over France and will be homosexual. I didn't necessarily know who this man is, just that he's coming. Braden said he's been doing research and this man right here is openly gay and is friends with Emmanuel Macron, and Emmanuel Macron wants him to be the next leader of France. Now, he doesn't look like Anderson Cooper—his hair is not gray—but I never heard him speak to see if he carries himself like Anderson Cooper. Or was it a type and shadow just telling me he's gay? I don't know, I just think it's interesting. I guess they're good friends. Maybe a little gray hair there? A little bit. Interesting. We'll see where that goes. Maybe there'll be another one. 2027, the Lord said. But why is the Lord telling us about this ahead of time? Because I saw a lot of persecution coming with your First Amendment rights in France and a major rising up of antisemitism. The Lord said this is what we're praying for—the revival and these things. I want to skip all that. Real quick, Braden has some things he wants to show you, and then we're just going to jump in the river. I don't want to take a lot of your time. FBI warns Iranian hackers may be targeting critical U.S. water and energy systems. What did the Holy Spirit tell you? Targeting. I said water facilities; I said you better pray over your water facilities and energy. I said electric grids. The Lord told us they're going to attack these. I said some will be out for up to a month. Iranian hackers—but it was more about the people that were in our country than out of our country. The thousand-plus men that are here who are like trained Navy SEALs. Why have they not done anything yet? I believe the power of prayer holds back a lot of stuff. But the Lord said they will not strike just to inflict a wound; they will go after the jugular. They want to take you down forever. You're not the main target; Israel is. But you are in the way. America is in the way, and they want to go for the jugular. They want to go for the kill shot. The Lord said they're not going to have a punch for a punch; they're going to go for the kill. It's not 'I hit you, you hit me.' No, they want to knock your legs out from underneath you. And that's what the Lord said. You're waiting for something much more: many 911s. A lot of them, but small 911s. That's what he said. And they would be across the land. Many, not large, but many. I thought it was interesting the way he said it that day. I was like, 'Okay.' So, that's what we're praying into. And then he said, 'Pray over Boston.' Then he talked about property in Oklahoma. He said people will be fleeing to Oklahoma, Texas, and other areas to get away from the East. He said you're going to see mass migration big time, like we've had enough. As we hear—Mamdani—what did our favorite mayor say today in New York? Did everybody remember what is this right here first? Do you want to show that first? Did you show what our favorite mayor in New York said today? I mean, this guy is a real winner. He is my favorite. He said he wants to tax white people. I said, 'Oh my gosh, do you see that?' So he's trying to pass laws for white Caucasians to give more money. I thought it was pretty interesting. Braden showed me. He goes, 'Oh goodness, Daddy.' I don't want to hear that guy. I can't stand him. At least he's up there and he's not somebody I have to pray for all the time. You can pray for him. I pray for our president. Maybe they'll find something and deport him or something. Look at this guy. Did you show what he said? I just think you can't make this stuff up. I just go, 'My God,' so you can read it on your own. I'm not reading it. But that's what he wants to do. Isn't he awesome? He's just a great old guy. Okay, let's go on to something else. The UK refused to help President Trump and had no role in pulling this off. It's not even close. That guy I told you is in with the elite, the Illuminati, the dark side. And I've told you I saw him being influenced by the bankers. My light went out. We'll have to buy a new one. Do you know what happened to that bulb? I told you I saw him. There you go. I think it got pulled on. It's a miracle the light's on. I saw them all having a plan concerning Agenda 2030, but it was the major bankers. As I saw, George was there and Bill. They were talking, and there were these three major bankers, big businessmen. They are very wealthy, influential businessmen. Bill was there, George, and an Asian man. But every single one of these people with BlackRock—the other guy was with him—I could see that they have meetings with Satan and I could see them devising this plan. These big banking people—and like I said, do not put their faces up. I'm not saying their last names. It doesn't matter. Each one of these people were having meetings with the devil, and they were influencing the politicians with their pockets. And that's why I said it's so important for the body of Christ to have money so you can influence politicians. Thank God for the Greens. Thank God for Hobby Lobby and for all the people that are like Chick-fil-A. When the founder of Chick-fil-A was the guy that owned it before he passed away—and his sons are in it—he was a tither. I know that for a fact. And it's amazing because this is the kind of stuff—these are the kind of leaders that we need because that influences these men to do right things. Mike Lindell, the MyPillow person—it was said that Mike Lindell's net worth was 300 million. He needs to be worth 300 billion. Why? Because that's what brings in the different laws. They don't listen to poor people. They listen to people with money. They don't care if you vote; they manipulate the vote. They are able to change things. They steal the vote. Thank you, Joe. But I'm saying you're able to manipulate things when you have money and power. The little guy doesn't matter to them. You're the slave to the lender. That's what I was trying to tell you all last night. It's time to believe for bigger because people in the body of Christ think too small, and the Lord said, 'Believe me for more. It's time to be the head, not the tail.' I'll get off that. Do you have anything else? NATO wasn't there when we needed them, and they won't be there if we need them again. 'Remember Greenland, that big, poorly run piece of ice?' President Donald J. Trump. I said I saw them striking deals again with Greenland, but his main focus in the days ahead will be Cuba. It's too close. And I saw what the Lord showed us about Cuba. Okay, so we've gone over enough. You have a good update. It's all happening. We'll see what Israel does in the days ahead. We'll see what Iran does to provoke Trump. 'What is that? This is Kash.' He said that. The FBI and our partners are trying to find the leaker. I said there's a leaker; there's a mole. The Lord said there's a mole. These people are crazy. They're putting people in harm's way. Why? Because you hate Trump. This has nothing to do with Trump. This has to do with our people who are serving our country, and you're putting—it would be like putting your sons and daughters in harm's way. These people are nuts. It has nothing to do with Trump. You're going to put people in danger that have nothing to do with him. They're just following orders because they swore an oath to protect and serve. What is wrong with them? 'Well, we're going to leak the information.' Well, who is that hurting? Trump? No, it's hurting the people who are just working. That's why I said they're sick in the head. Father, I thank you. Where is your mama? Does she want to pray with me? I told her when I was done that she could come and pray. Diana was going to come and pray. She wanted to read a little bit of the book to change the atmosphere after all this. I did it pretty quick, only 37 minutes. She was going to read a little bit more of that glory book. It really does stir the flame inside of you. But let's take communion real quick. Father, we thank you for the body. Hey, you want to come and pray? You can read that book. I'll move this up so I can get out and you can get in easier. Okay, you can start reading. Father, we just thank you for the body that you took all of it for us, that we walk in victory. We take this body right now in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Father, that you were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you. And with your stripes, Lord, we're healed. We believe, Father, that we are the healed. We believe that we are the victorious. We believe, Father, that we are the head and not the tail. And we take this body right now in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Father, that we are pressing forth and we're taking the land like the children of Israel did back in the day. We are going to take the land for Jesus. And we are not just going to sit by and say they're as big as grasshoppers. Get a backbone and go out and get that land. 'Well, they're as big as grasshoppers.' I don't care. Who is this uncircumcised Philistine that he tried to defy the armies of a God? Who is the devil that tries to miss me? Who is the world? If God came through for them underneath the old covenant, how much more will he do it for you? You've got to believe bigger. If God can do it for the Greens and Hobby Lobby with a creative idea that started out of his garage, how much more can God do it for you?
